# Quantin

> Quantin is a quantitative portfolio service that uses machine learning to select the 15 best-performing US stocks every two months. No opinions — just data.

## What it is

Quantin (quantin.finance) gives retail investors access to a systematic, data-driven stock portfolio. Every two months, a quantitative model screens 798 US stocks and ETFs, runs 150 backtested strategies against 8 years of real market data, detects the current market regime using machine learning, and selects the top 15 positions by risk-adjusted momentum.

Subscribers receive the current portfolio and email or push alerts every time the model adds a new pick, exits a position, or signals a move to cash.

## How the model works

1. **Parameters**: 798 stocks and ETFs screened. 150 strategy combinations tested. Lookback windows from 3 to 12 months. Portfolio size: 15 stocks. Rebalance frequency: every 2 months. Equal weighting.

2. **Backtesting**: Each of the 150 strategies is tested against 8 years of real market data (2017–present) using walk-forward validation to avoid lookahead bias.

3. **Market regime detection**: A machine learning model classifies current market conditions to determine which type of environment the portfolio is operating in.

4. **Strategy selection**: A second machine learning step matches the best-performing strategy to the current market regime.

5. **Portfolio construction**: Walk-forward validation across 50 rebalance periods. Stocks ranked by risk-adjusted momentum. Top 15 selected with equal weight.

## Historical performance (backtest, Feb 2018 – Jun 2026)

- Annual return: +23.6% (S&P 500: +14.5%)
- Maximum drawdown: −8.4% (S&P 500: −33.7%)
- Sharpe ratio: 1.95 (S&P 500: 0.80)
- $10,000 invested in Feb 2018 → $58,003 by Jun 2026 (S&P 500: $30,714)

All figures are walk-forward validated with no lookahead bias.

## Pricing

$25 per month. No lock-in.

## Free preview

A free historical snapshot of the portfolio as it stood 90 days ago is available at quantin.finance/preview. It shows all positions, performance since entry, and portfolio metrics — no account required.

## Key terms

- **Walk-forward validation**: A backtesting method that simulates real-world conditions by training on past data and testing on future data in sequence, preventing overfitting.
- **Sharpe ratio**: Return earned per unit of risk. Above 1 is considered strong; 1.95 means the model earns nearly twice as much return per unit of risk as the S&P 500.
- **Max drawdown**: The largest peak-to-trough decline in portfolio value. A lower drawdown means less capital at risk during market downturns.
- **Regime detection**: A machine learning technique that classifies the current market environment to adapt strategy selection accordingly.
- **Equal weight**: Each of the 15 positions receives the same allocation (≈6.7% of portfolio), avoiding concentration risk.

## Contact and links

- Website: https://quantin.finance
- Free preview: https://quantin.finance/preview
- Subscribe: https://quantin.finance/subscribe
